calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-06-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nathan Wang Esq. for Charles Courcoux, Defendant/Appellant who is also present
Danny Lieu and Daisy Zhang Plaintiffs

This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn

Danny Lieu testifies on his own behalf
The Court accepts Plaintiffs' group exhibits No. 1

Nathan Wang examines Appellant/Defendant, Charles Courcoux.
The Court accepts defendants' group exhibits A
Nathan Wang questions Danny Lieu and Daisy Zhang
Nathan Wang qustions Dr. Missirian, orthopedic surgeon, who testifies on behalf of defendant

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
The Court will return all exhibits upon ruling

Judge Pro Tem: E. Myles; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not Reported (525)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-14-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Danny Lieu & Daisy Zhang, Plaintiffs/Respondents appear with Cantonese Interpreter Wing Shum
NO APPEARANCE by Appellant/Defendant Charles Courcoux

APPEAL DIMISSED - No apperance for Appellant.

Judge Cynthia M. Lee, Clerk C. Banayad, not reported (606)
